title: Simply Survival
description: A vanilla modpack focused on perfecting Minecraft, with an active community and development.
body:
# Simply Survival

Welcome to Simply Survival where every block, every tick, and every pixel matters. This meticulously curated modpack is designed for players who crave peak performance, seamless gameplay, and a world that runs like butter. 🧈

🔧 **Optimized Performance:**
- Say goodbye to lag spikes and chunk loading delays. Our modpack includes performance-enhancing mods that optimize memory usage, reduce CPU strain, and fine-tune rendering. Whether you're exploring vast landscapes or building intricate structures, your game will run smooth on even low-end devices. 🖥️

🌟 **Perfecting the Vanilla Experience:**
- We believe that Minecraft's magic lies in its simplicity. Simply Survival enhances the vanilla gameplay without straying from Mojang's original vision. Expect quality-of-life improvements, bug fixes, and subtle enhancements that make your adventures more enjoyable.

🌐 **Server-Friendly and Multiplayer Ready:**
- Simply Survival is designed with multiplayer servers in mind. Forge alliances, collaborate on massive projects, and experience the joy of shared achievements. We ensure compatibility and stability, even when playing with friends. 🫂

🌈 **Visual Enhancements (Without Sacrificing Performance):**
- Who says you can't have both eye candy and buttery-smooth gameplay? Our modpack includes shaders, improved lighting, and texture enhancements that elevate Minecraft's visuals. Prepare to be awestruck by sunsets and enchanted by starlit nights.

---

Whether you're a seasoned miner or a budding builder, Simply Survival invites you to explore a world where optimization meets creativity. Dive in, fine-tune your experience, and let your inner explorer thrive! 🌟✨

---
<details>
<summary>Mod List and Links</summary>
